title: Resolution Expressing Support and Interposing Non-objection to the Operation of Four (4) Modern E-jeepneys Within Barangay Lalakay to the University of the Phillipines Los Baños (UPLB) and Vice Versa of Snodlob Transport Service and Multi-purpose Cooperative. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, REE, RMP, MPA,02/08/2022)
